title: Google Just Raised $85 Billion in One Week for AI
script: Google's parent company just pulled off one of the biggest fundraises in US history. Alphabet raised $84.75 billion this week — $10 billion directly from Berkshire Hathaway, the rest from banks and public markets. The purpose: AI data centers. The company plans to spend $180 billion on infrastructure this year alone. The AI race has become so expensive, even the most profitable company on Earth needs to raise money.
